_meta.label: Estimates based on published fee schedules, July 2026. Not quotes. PayDesk does not move funds.
_meta.source_note: Hand-curated from publicly published provider fee schedules and World Bank Remittance Prices Worldwide corridor averages. Figures are typical, not guaranteed.

rails.name: USDC on Base
caveats: Client must be able to send stablecoin
Off-ramp to local currency may add 0.5-2%

rails.name: USDT on XLayer
caveats: Client must be able to send stablecoin
Native settlement rail for OKX.AI agent payments

rails.name: International bank wire (SWIFT)
caveats: Sender and intermediary banks may each deduct a fee
FX applied at bank spread, typically 1-3% over mid-market

rails.name: Remittance provider
caveats: Corridor-dependent; fee shown is a typical blended average
Advertised rate often excludes FX spread

rails.name: PayPal cross-border
caveats: Additional 3-4% currency conversion spread on withdrawal
